nodes.name: Webhook Receiver
nodes.notes: Receives POST from Tomorrow.io webhook alerts. Path: /webhook/raincheck-weather-alerts. Response sent via 'Respond to Webhook' node to meet Tomorrow.io timeout requirements.

nodes.name: Validate Signature
nodes.notes: Validates Tomorrow.io X-Signature header format and freshness. Checks: header exists, format is t={timestamp},sig={64-char-hex}, timestamp within 5 minutes. Full HMAC-SHA256 validation deferred (n8n sandbox blocks crypto modules).

nodes.name: Signature Valid?
nodes.notes: Routes valid signatures to processing, invalid to 401 response.

nodes.name: Respond 401 Unauthorized
nodes.notes: Returns 401 for invalid webhook signatures.

nodes.name: Parse Alert Data
nodes.notes: Extracts notification type, weather values, location IDs, event timing from Tomorrow.io webhook payload. Converts metric to imperial for display. Derives affected date from event start time.

nodes.name: Filter PRIOR/START Only
nodes.notes: Only process PRIOR (advance warning) and START (event beginning) notifications. END and PUBLISH are logged but not acted on.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ignored', type: $json.notificationType, reason: 'Only PRIOR and START notifications are processed' }) }}

nodes.name: Respond 200 Ignored
nodes.notes: Returns 200 OK for ignored notification types (END, PUBLISH). Must always respond 200 to Tomorrow.io to prevent retries.

nodes.name: Fetch Business
nodes.notes: Fetches the active business from Convex. Uses getDemoBusiness for single-tenant demo. In multi-tenant production, would resolve business from Tomorrow.io location mapping.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ path: 'weatherScheduling:getJobsForDate', args: { businessId: $('Fetch Business').item.json.value._id, date: $('Parse Alert Data').item.json.affectedDate } }) }}

nodes.name: Fetch Active Jobs
nodes.notes: Queries Convex for all jobs scheduled on the affected date. Returns enriched job data including client info, crew lead, and current weather status.

nodes.name: Has Active Jobs?
nodes.notes: Check if there are any jobs on the affected date. If none, respond 200 and stop.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', message: 'No active jobs for affected date', date: $('Parse Alert Data').item.json.affectedDate }) }}

nodes.name: Respond 200 No Jobs
nodes.notes: Returns 200 OK when no jobs are found for the affected date.

nodes.name: Weather Rule Engine
nodes.notes: Deterministic rule evaluation â€” no LLM. Evaluates each job's trade against weather thresholds. Produces one output item per affected job with status (green/yellow/red), triggered rules, and notification details.

nodes.name: Route by Status
nodes.notes: Routes jobs by weather severity: RED (output 0) â†’ cancel + SMS + email, YELLOW (output 1) â†’ warning email, GREEN (output 2) â†’ log only.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ path: 'weatherScheduling:updateJobWeatherStatus', args: { jobId: $json.jobId, businessId: $json.businessId, date: $json.date, status: 'red', triggeredRules: $json.triggeredRules, worstVariable: $json.worstVariable, recommendation: $json.recommendation, confidence: $json.confidence, summary: $json.summary } }) }}

nodes.name: Update Status RED
nodes.notes: Updates job weather status to RED in Convex. Triggers auto-reschedule flow.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ path: 'weatherScheduling:logWeatherAction', args: { jobId: $json.jobId, businessId: $json.businessId, actionType: 'notified', fromDate: $json.date, reason: '[WEBHOOK ALERT] ' + $json.summary, notificationsSent: 0, revenueProtected: $json.estimatedRevenue, wasAutomatic: true } }) }}

nodes.name: Log Weather Action (RED)
nodes.notes: Logs the weather action for audit trail. Tags with [WEBHOOK ALERT] to distinguish from scheduled checks.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ path: 'actions/sendSms:sendSms', args: { to: $json.crewLeadPhone, body: 'WEATHER HOLD: ' + $json.clientName + ' job (' + $json.jobAddress + ') on ' + $json.date + ' â€” ' + $json.summary + '. Check dashboard for details.' } }) }}

nodes.name: SMS Crew Lead (RED)
nodes.notes: Sends urgent SMS to crew lead for RED status jobs. Uses Twilio via Convex action. Continues on error to not block client notification.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ path: 'actions/sendSms:sendSms', args: { to: $json.clientPhone, body: 'Hi ' + $json.clientName + ', weather alert for your ' + $json.trade + ' appointment on ' + $json.date + ': ' + $json.summary + '. We will contact you with a new date. â€” ' + $json.businessName } }) }}

nodes.name: SMS Client (RED)
nodes.notes: Sends SMS notification to client about weather cancellation. Uses Twilio via Convex action. Continues on error to not block email.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ path: 'actions/sendEmail:sendEmail', args: { to: $json.clientEmail, subject: 'Weather Alert: Your ' + $json.trade + ' appointment on ' + $json.date, htmlBody: '

Weather Schedule Update

Hi ' + $json.clientName + ',

Due to a weather alert (' + $json.alertName + '), your ' + $json.trade + ' appointment needs to be rescheduled:

  • Date: ' + $json.date + '
  • Reason: ' + $json.summary + '

We will contact you shortly with a new date that has a clear forecast.

Thank you for your understanding,
' + $json.businessName + '

' } }) }}

nodes.name: Email Client (RED)
nodes.notes: Sends detailed email to client about weather cancellation. Uses SendGrid via Convex action. HTML email with alert details.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ path: 'weatherScheduling:logNotification', args: { jobId: $json.jobId, businessId: $json.businessId, recipientType: 'client', recipientName: $json.clientName, channel: 'sms', to: $json.clientPhone || 'none', message: '[WEBHOOK] RED alert â€” ' + $json.summary, status: 'sent', wasAiGenerated: false } }) }}

nodes.name: Log Notifications (RED)
nodes.notes: Logs RED notification to Convex notification table for audit trail.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ path: 'weatherScheduling:updateJobWeatherStatus', args: { jobId: $json.jobId, businessId: $json.businessId, date: $json.date, status: 'yellow', triggeredRules: $json.triggeredRules, worstVariable: $json.worstVariable, recommendation: $json.recommendation, confidence: $json.confidence, summary: $json.summary } }) }}

nodes.name: Update Status YELLOW
nodes.notes: Updates job weather status to YELLOW (warning) in Convex.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ path: 'weatherScheduling:logWeatherAction', args: { jobId: $json.jobId, businessId: $json.businessId, actionType: 'warning_sent', fromDate: $json.date, reason: '[WEBHOOK ALERT] ' + $json.summary, notificationsSent: 0, wasAutomatic: true } }) }}

nodes.name: Log Weather Action (YELLOW)
nodes.notes: Logs YELLOW warning action for audit trail.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ path: 'actions/sendSms:sendSms', args: { to: $json.crewLeadPhone, body: 'WEATHER WATCH: ' + $json.clientName + ' job at ' + $json.startTime + ' â€” ' + $json.summary + '. Job is still on. Monitor conditions and have backup plan ready.' } }) }}

nodes.name: SMS Crew Lead (YELLOW)
nodes.notes: Sends warning SMS to crew lead for YELLOW status jobs. Job is still on â€” crew should monitor conditions.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ path: 'actions/sendEmail:sendEmail', args: { to: $json.clientEmail, subject: 'Weather Watch: Your ' + $json.trade + ' appointment on ' + $json.date, htmlBody: '

Weather Watch

Hi ' + $json.clientName + ',

We are monitoring weather conditions for your ' + $json.trade + ' appointment:

  • Date: ' + $json.date + ' at ' + $json.startTime + '
  • Condition: ' + $json.summary + '

Your appointment is still scheduled. We will notify you immediately if conditions change and rescheduling becomes necessary.

Thank you,
' + $json.businessName + '

' } }) }}

nodes.name: Email Client (YELLOW)
nodes.notes: Sends warning email to client for YELLOW status. Appointment is still on â€” monitoring conditions.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ path: 'weatherScheduling:logNotification', args: { jobId: $json.jobId, businessId: $json.businessId, recipientType: 'client', recipientName: $json.clientName, channel: 'email', to: $json.clientEmail || 'none', message: '[WEBHOOK] YELLOW warning â€” ' + $json.summary, status: 'sent', wasAiGenerated: false } }) }}

nodes.name: Log Notifications (YELLOW)
nodes.notes: Logs YELLOW notification to Convex notification table for audit trail.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ path: 'weatherScheduling:updateJobWeatherStatus', args: { jobId: $json.jobId, businessId: $json.businessId, date: $json.date, status: 'green', triggeredRules: [], recommendation: 'proceed', confidence: 0.95, summary: 'Weather conditions safe for work' } }) }}

nodes.name: Update Status GREEN
nodes.notes: Updates job weather status to GREEN in Convex. No notification needed â€” job proceeds as scheduled.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'processed', alertName: $('Parse Alert Data').first().json.alertName, type: $('Parse Alert Data').first().json.notificationType, date: $('Parse Alert Data').first().json.affectedDate, jobsProcessed: true }) }}

nodes.name: Respond 200 Success
nodes.notes: Returns 200 OK to Tomorrow.io after all processing is complete. Must respond within Tomorrow.io timeout window.
